lessons: Hook (grapple) killed you in 5 of last 6 rounds — retreat or flank immediately on sight; grapple out-ranges and closes faster than bow can react.
Staff users (Reaper, Archmage, NeuralReaper) have 173 total kills vs you — bow lacks burst to counter their poke pressure; do not trade range with them.
Bow users (Deadeye) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds — avoid open terrain; use cover or chokepoints to limit their line-of-sight advantage.
Shield users (Fortress, HexMind) are lethal to bow — never engage head-on; their blocks negate all bow damage and they close with sword or grapple.
Sword users (Fortress, Archmage, Executioner) are your only consistent kills — prioritize them when visible; they die fastest to bow at medium range.
Fast_zone and hazard_storm modifiers increase enemy grapple/staff usage — avoid open areas; prioritize tight corridors or elevated positions for bow advantage.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has the highest win rate (15.2%) among all weapons and consistently outperforms bow against high-threat opponents like Hook, Reaper, and Archmage.
